title: PNW vs. IDA: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors with an interest in Utility - Electric Power stocks have likely encountered both Pinnacle West (PNW) and IdaCorp (IDA). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: Pinnacle West (PNW) Rides on Investments, Clean Power Generation
text: Pinnacle West (PNW) is expected to further gain from its ongoing investments, clean power generation and expanding customer base.

title: EONGY vs. PNW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors with an interest in Utility - Electric Power stocks have likely encountered both E.ON SE (EONGY) and Pinnacle West (PNW). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Pinnacle West (PNW) Misses on Q2 Earnings, Raises '23 EPS View
text: Pinnacle West's (PNW) second-quarter 2023 performance is backed by robust customer growth. The company raises its guidance for 2023 earnings per share.

title: Pinnacle West (PNW) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Pinnacle West (PNW) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.94 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.19 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.45 per share a year ago.

title: Pinnacle West Reports Lower 2023 Second-Quarter Financial Results
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp. today reported 2023 second-quarter consolidated net income of $106.7 million, or $0.94 per diluted share of common stock.
